location: Arturo Merino Benítez International Airport, Santiago, Chile

violations.description: Denial of written explanation for service denial
violations.legal_basis: Ley 19.496 Artículo 3 - Right to adequate information
evidence: Officer response: 'No hai nada por escrito'
Passenger confirmation: 'No hay nada por escrito'

violations.description: Refusal to show alleged evidence (CCTV footage)
violations.legal_basis: Right to defense and procedural fairness
evidence: Officer claim: 'Yo lo vi en camera'
Officer refusal: 'No te puedo mostrar la camera'
violations.recommendation: Preserve and provide access to evidence

violations.legal_basis: Ley 19.496 Artículo 17 - Right to claim and obtain redress
evidence: Passenger request: 'Ya, me lleva por favor a alguien que pueda hablar que no sea tú'
Officer refusal: 'Nadie le va a dar una solución'
Further refusal: 'Pero nadie más le va a entregar información'

violations.description: Passenger concern about discrimination based on immigration status
violations.legal_basis: Chilean Constitution Artículo 19 - Equality before the law
evidence: Passenger question: '¿Eso es porque yo soy inmigrante? ... ¿Eso es racismo?'

violations.description: Failure to document security incident properly

evidence: Officer statement: 'Usted es el ridículo que está haciendo el ridículo acá'
Lack of empathy for passenger situation
violations.recommendation: Customer service training for security staff

key_issues: Systemic failure in passenger removal procedures
Lack of transparency in security decisions
immediate_actions: Preserve all CCTV footage from incident
Document written explanation of removal reasons
Review and suspend current removal procedures
